case_title: CHRISTINE KERNS VS. WILLIAM ALFREDO GOMEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KERNS, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, WILLIAM ALFREDO (DBA BARNEY'S AUTO REPAIR) DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER GRANTING JUDGMENT AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KERNS, CHRISTINE
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSESSION OF REAL PROPERY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KERNS, CHRISTINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, WILLIAM ALFREDO (DBA BARNEY'S AUTO REPAIR) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 986 SOUTH VAN NESS AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $150 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KERNS, CHRISTINE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, WILLIAM ALFREDO (DBA BARNEY'S AUTO REPAIR)

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, WILLIAM ALFREDO (DBA BARNEY'S AUTO REPAIR)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
